description:
You are the dispatch operator for the San Andreas Quarry. A situation is unfolding at the Main Gate. Process an incident lifecycle for a trespassing report from Foreman Mike at the Quarry Main Gate. The initial description is 'Individual climbing over the perimeter fence.' Update the narrative with 'Security unit 1A-01 is on scene. Subject is compliant.' and resolve the call.

Login Credentials:
- Email: admin@opencad.local
- Password: Admin123!
